title: Mend AI
description:
Mend AI Solutions:
	1.	AI Red Teaming
Tests models and agents for vulnerabilities like prompt injection, RAG poisoning, and code execution.
	2.	Third-Party AI Risk
Finds shadow AI - models, agents, system-prompts, datasets—in code and artifacts. Surfaces known risks and suggests mitigations like sanitization or filtering.
	3.	First-Party AI Risk
Audits in-house agents for system prompt flaws and risky behaviors. Guides secure design through agent isolation and input/output controls.

items: Available Agent Scanning, Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Sandboxed testing of all tool calls, code execution, cloud API triggers
